source.title: OpenAI and Google Workers File Amicus Brief in Support of Anthropic Against the US Government
source.summary: More than 30 employees from OpenAI and Google, including Google DeepMind chief scientist Jeff Dean, filed an amicus brief supporting Anthropic in its legal fight against the US government. The brief argues that the Pentagon's decision to blacklist Anthropic undermines American innovation and competitiveness in AI. Signatories emphasize that contractual and technological safeguards against catastrophic AI misuse represent vital protection in the absence of public law.
